overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a first-person walk through a futuristic urban industrial district. The character walks along sidewalks past barbed wire fences and power lines, crosses an intersection, and views a sunken highway with graffiti-covered walls, with a mix of high-tech skyscrapers and industrial buildings in the background under clear afternoon skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk next to industrial street with barbed wire fence

events.description: pedestrian passes close to camera on the left side
approaching intersection and preparing to cross the street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to a barbed wire fence, approaching an intersection

notable_agents.action: walking past camera in the opposite direction along the sidewalk
dark colored car driving along the street parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: metal security fence with barbed wire running along the right side of the sidewalk
tall electrical transmission tower with multiple high-voltage cables
low-rise industrial structures with smokestacks visible in the distance
rocky hillside with scattered buildings in the background

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk along a concrete sidewalk bordered by a barbed wire fence on the right and power lines on the left. The environment is industrial with distant factories and a rocky hillside. Pedestrians walk toward the camera, and cars drive along the multi-lane street. The lighting is warm afternoon sun with clear skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with tall commercial building and moderate traffic

events.description: crossed intersection, barbed wire fence no longer visible, tall futuristic skyscraper comes into view on left
multiple vehicles including a truck and cars passing through the intersection

agents.ego_description: crossed the intersection and continued walking along the new sidewalk with a tall building now on the left

notable_agents.description: white sedan driving past along the street
large truck driving through the intersection ahead

entered.detail: futuristic high-rise building with glass facade and exposed structural elements
modern street light with horizontal orange fixture
multi-story commercial structures with various signage

segments.scene_description: After crossing the intersection, the scene opens up to reveal a wider urban street with a prominent futuristic skyscraper on the left. The barbed wire fence and power lines from the previous segment are no longer visible. Moderate traffic flows through the intersection, and the camera continues along the sidewalk with the tall building dominating the left side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: overlook of sunken highway with graffiti-covered walls

events.description: view opens to reveal sunken highway with steep concrete walls covered in graffiti
camera approaches edge providing clear view down into the sunken canal with vehicles driving below

agents.ego_description: walking along the edge of an overpass overlooking the sunken highway, observing the traffic below

entered.detail: depressed multi-lane road with steep concrete walls and graffiti art
concrete retaining wall covered in colorful graffiti and street art
bridge structure with railings crossing over the sunken highway

segments.scene_description: The final segment reveals a dramatic view of a sunken highway or canal with steep graffiti-covered concrete walls. The camera walks along an overpass structure looking down at vehicles driving through the depressed roadway. The tall skyscraper from the previous segment is now visible in the far left background, while industrial structures and power lines appear in the distance across the sunken highway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through an industrial urban district that transitions from a confined sidewalk into a wide-open vista of futuristic architecture and sunken infrastructure. It begins with a walk along a concrete path bordered by a barbed wire fence and power lines, with distant factories and a rocky hillside visible under a warm afternoon sun. As the camera crosses an intersection, the narrow industrial corridor opens up into a broader street dominated by a towering futuristic skyscraper on the left. The scene then shifts as the camera moves onto an overpass, revealing a dramatic view of a sunken highway with steep, graffiti-covered concrete walls. Finally, the perspective looks down upon the traffic below while the distant skyscraper and industrial structures frame the horizon under clear skies.
